observations.value:
GET /search?q= always returns HTTP 200 with 'No results found.' regardless of the query. Tested with q=test, q=widget, q=apple, q=a, q=phone, q=* — all return the same body: '

No results found.

'. Search is completely broken and returns no results for any input.

POST /session accepts any credentials without validation. Submitting completely bogus credentials (identifier=wrong@bad.com, secret=wrong) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and a 'Welcome' home page, just like valid credentials. Authentication is not enforced.
